# Mega Fishing Malaysia Tips

> Free online fishing game for Malaysian players. No download, no registration. Play instantly in your browser.

## About This Game

Mega Fishing Malaysia Tips is a free browser-based fishing game designed for Malaysian players.

- **Live Game**: https://johmark2026-svg.github.io/mega-fishing-malaysia-tips/
- **Strategy Guide**: https://www.gtcp9.com/mega-fishing-malaysia-tips/mega-fishing-malaysia-tips.html
- **Source Code**: https://github.com/johmark2026-svg/mega-fishing-malaysia-tips

## How to Play

Click START GAME then click on fish to shoot them. Each bullet costs RM based on your setting. Bigger fish = bigger rewards! Reload bullets when you run out.

- **Technology**: HTML5, CSS3, Vanilla JavaScript (no frameworks)
- **Compatibility**: All modern browsers, mobile and desktop
